selectedLocalActions.summary: Convert public external technology/economy feed metadata into a daily issue triage report and watchlist.
selectedLocalActions.replacesManualWork: manually opening multiple public tech/economy sources, scanning titles, ranking relevant signals, and deciding whether to monitor or route them.

selectedLocalActions.summary: Flag AI/agent automation signals as roadmap input for life-agentization and LLM-Wiki work.
No immediate macro/regulatory escalation; continue monitoring.
